articles.description: Real Vision Chief Crypto Analyst Jamie Coutts has sounded a stark warning for Bitcoin in the months ahead. articles.description: World Network, formerly known as Worldcoin, the crypto and digital identity project tied to Tools for Humanity and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, is in discussions with Visa to integrate card features into its self-custody crypto wallet, CoinDesk reported Monday, citing a source with knowledge of the talks. This came after Bloomberg reported last April that the project was negotiating potential partnerships with PayPal and OpenAI to broaden its technological and operational impacts.
